description: A centuries-old pressed trout sushi in a cedar mold, wrapped in bamboo leaves.
teaser: There is a dish here that takes hours to make under weight. The cedar is not packaging — it is an ingredient.

steps.instruction: Select the right knife for slicing sakuramasu trout
Cook the sushi rice to the right temperature
How long do you press the masuzushi?
steps.slap_context: pressing masuzushi in the cedar mold

tripo_prompt: Toyama masuzushi pressed trout sushi in a round cedar wooden box wrapped in bamboo leaves, Japanese food, top-down view, white background
seedance_prompt: Japanese chef carefully preparing masuzushi pressed sushi, cedar mold, bamboo leaves, traditional kitchen, cinematic food documentary style
guide_personality: precise, proud of Toyama heritage, slightly stern
